# AI Dispatcher Settings

Fine-tune how the AI optimization engine assigns jobs to technicians.

## Optimization Preferences

Configure at **Settings > AI Dispatcher**:
- **Planning Mode** — Sequential (batch) or Continuous (real-time)
- **Priority Weights** — Balance between travel time, skill match, and workload distribution
- **Time Constraints** — Maximum travel time and scheduling windows

## Auto-Dispatch

Enable automatic dispatch to let the AI assign jobs without manual approval for high-confidence matches.

## Constraint Settings

- **Skill Matching** — Require exact skill match or allow partial matches
- **Service Area Enforcement** — Strict zone boundaries or flexible overflow
- **Capacity Limits** — Maximum jobs per technician per day
